'''fadhuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignosticism|ignosticism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignosticism|ignosticism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fadhuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhirith|fædhirith]] || [[word:fædhirij|fædhirij]] || [[word:fædhirish|fædhirish]] || [[word:fædhiri|fædhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhudhuruth|fadhudhuruth]] || [[word:fadhudhuruj|fadhudhuruj]] || [[word:fadhudhurush|fadhudhurush]] || [[word:fadhudhuru|fadhudhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhuruth|fadhuruth]] || [[word:fadhuruj|fadhuruj]] || [[word:fadhurush|fadhurush]] || [[word:fadhuru|fadhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhufrufth|fadhufrufth]] || [[word:fadhufrufj|fadhufrufj]] || [[word:fadhufrufsh|fadhufrufsh]] || [[word:fadhufruf|fadhufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhuruthu|fadhuruthu]] || [[word:fadhuruju|fadhuruju]] || [[word:fadhurushu|fadhurushu]] || [[word:fadhuruku|fadhuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhuruth|fadhuruth]] || [[word:fadhuruj|fadhuruj]] || [[word:fadhurush|fadhurush]] || [[word:fadhuru|fadhuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhuruthul|fadhuruthul]] || [[word:fadhurujul|fadhurujul]] || [[word:fadhurushul|fadhurushul]] || [[word:fadhurukul|fadhurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhuruuthuthu|fadhuruuthuthu]] || [[word:fadhuruujuju|fadhuruujuju]] || [[word:fadhuruushushu|fadhuruushushu]] || [[word:fadhuruuku|fadhuruuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhuruthun|fadhuruthun]] || [[word:fadhurujun|fadhurujun]] || [[word:fadhurushun|fadhurushun]] || [[word:fadhurukun|fadhurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhuruthuoro|fadhuruthuoro]] || [[word:fadhurujuoro|fadhurujuoro]] || [[word:fadhurushuoro|fadhurushuoro]] || [[word:fadhurukuoro|fadhurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
